OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afsari, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
John Chang, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff American Hotels, Inc.
Jak Steven Marquez representing the plaintiff.

Defendant John Lamont is present.
William Shapiro representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 4, 2007 is vacated.
